name: crazay-arkade
description: Web-based multiplayer Crazay Arkade style game

scripts.test:agent-heuristic: node test/agent-heuristic.js && node test/agent-pacer.js && node test/agent-llm-reply-controller.js
scripts.test:agent-arena: node --test test/agent-protocol.js test/agent-fairness.js test/agent-robustness.js test/agent-lifecycle.js test/agent-spectator-room.js
scripts.test:byo-arena: node --test test/auth-store.js test/auth-store-redteam.js test/auth-session-oauth.js test/auth-session-oauth-redteam.js test/auth-keys-api.js test/auth-keys-api-redteam.js test/agent-auth.js test/agent-auth-redteam.js test/agent-matchmaking.js test/agent-matchmaking-redteam.js test/agent-conn-abuse.js test/agent-conn-abuse-redteam.js test/agent-resource-limits.js test/agent-resource-limits-redteam.js test/byo-integration.js
scripts.test:agent-all: npm run test:agent && npm run test:agent-security && npm run test:agent-arena
scripts.test:regression: node test/team.js && node test/team-solo.js && node test/eight.js && node test/bomb.js && node test/boss-unit.js && node test/origin-safe.js && node test/player-collision.js
